---
title: "Tools"
title-block-style: none
pagetitle: "Tools | Mesfin Genie"
description: "Interactive decision-support and economic-evaluation tools developed through collaborative research."
page-layout: full
image: /assets/img/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell"><p class="eyebrow">Tools</p><h1>Decision support and economic evaluation</h1><p class="lead">Two live applications that translate research evidence into policy and economic-evaluation decisions.</p></div></header>
<section class="content-section"><div class="page-shell"><div class="tool-row"><div class="meta">Live · Version 4.4.1</div><div><h2>eMANDEVAL Future</h2><p>For researchers and policy analysts comparing prospective vaccine-mandate designs. The tool reports predicted public support, expected lives saved, benefit-cost outcomes and policy trade-offs.</p><p><strong>Developer:</strong> Mesfin Genie · <a href="/tools/emandelval-future/">Methods, limitations and citation</a></p></div><a class="button-primary" href="/eMANDEVA-DecisionAid-V18/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Launch tool ↗</a></div><div class="tool-row"><div class="meta">Live · Version 2026.18</div><div><h2>SOIL CRC Benefit-Cost Analysis Tool</h2><p>For agricultural researchers and project teams comparing farm-practice and soil-management interventions using net present value, benefit-cost ratio, return on investment and sensitivity analysis.</p><p><strong>Attribution:</strong> Project lead and publisher, Dr Frank Wogbe Agbola; developer/co-developer, Mesfin Genie · <a href="/tools/soil-crc-bca-tool/">Methods, limitations and citation</a></p></div><a class="button-primary" href="/farming-bca-tool-v18/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Launch tool ↗</a></div></div></section>
```
